---
title: "Rapport financier hebdomadaire"
subtitle: "`r params$doc_title`"
format:
  typst:
    margin:
      x: 2cm
      y: 2cm
    paper: "a4"
    columns: 1
    font-paths: []
    mainfont: "Liberation Sans"
    fontsize: 11pt
params:
  doc_title: NA
  fin_data: NA
  variations: NA
  ai_analysis: NA
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
library(gt)
library(dplyr)
```

📊 Mouvements du Marché :

```{r index_variations}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false

raw_fin_data <- params$fin_data

if (!is.null(raw_fin_data)) {

  df_fin <- as.data.frame(raw_fin_data) |>
    mutate(date = as.Date(date)) |>
    filter(!is.na(value))

  if (nrow(df_fin) > 0) {

    df_table <- df_fin |>
      arrange(index, date) |>
      group_by(index) |>
      summarize(
        start_value   = first(value),
        end_value     = last(value),
        variation_pct = (last(value) / first(value) - 1) * 100,
        .groups       = "drop"
      )

    df_table |>
      gt() |>
      opt_table_font(
        font = list("Liberation Sans", "Helvetica", "Arial", "sans-serif")
      ) |>
      cols_label(
        index         = "Indice",
        start_value   = "Ouverture",
        end_value     = "Clôture",
        variation_pct = "Variation"
      ) |>
      fmt_number(columns = c("start_value", "end_value"), decimals = 2, sep_mark = "") |>
      fmt_number(columns = "variation_pct", decimals = 2, pattern = "{x} %") |>
      data_color(
        columns = "variation_pct",
        method = "numeric",
        palette = c("#e74c3c", "white", "#27ae60"),
        domain = c(-5, 5)
      ) |>
      tab_style(
        style = list(
          cell_fill(color = "#f4f6f8"),
          cell_text(weight = "bold", color = "#2c3e50")
        ),
        locations = cells_column_labels()
      ) |>
      tab_style(
        style = cell_text(color = "#2c3e50"),
        locations = cells_body()
      ) |>
      cols_align(align = "left",  columns = "index") |>
      cols_align(align = "right", columns = c("start_value", "end_value", "variation_pct")) |>
      tab_options(
        table.width = pct(100),
        table.border.top.style = "solid",
        table.border.top.color = "#2c3e50",
        table.border.top.width = px(2),
        table.border.bottom.style = "solid",
        table.border.bottom.color = "#2c3e50",
        table.border.bottom.width = px(2),
        column_labels.border.bottom.style = "solid",
        column_labels.border.bottom.color = "#adb5bd",
        column_labels.border.bottom.width = px(1),
        row.striping.background_color = "#fafbfc",
        data_row.padding = px(7),
        table.font.size = px(11)
      ) |>
      opt_row_striping()

  } else {
    cat("Données vides.")
  }

} else {
  cat("Aucune donnée disponible.")
}
```

🧠 Analyse de l'IA

```{r ai_report}
#| echo: false
#| results: asis

if (!is.null(params$ai_analysis)) {
  cat(params$ai_analysis)
} else {
  cat("_Analyse non disponible._")
}
```

_Rapport généré automatiquement le `r format(Sys.time(), "%d/%m/%Y à %H:%M")`._
